title: acorus calamus var. spurius
intro: Acorus calamus var. spurius, also known as the 'false calamus', is a type of plant that belongs to the Acorus genus and is closely related to the common sweet flag (Acorus calamus). The medicinal properties of Acorus calamus var. spurius include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include relief from digestive problems, such as nausea and vomiting, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress. Acorus calamus var. spurius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots are often dried and used in traditional medicine.
